## 📋 Pull Request Template

### 🎯 Description
<!-- Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR -->

### 🔄 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant options with an `x` -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style change (formatting, linting, etc.)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (neither fixes bug nor adds feature)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI related changes
- [ ] 🧪 Test related changes
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update

### 📝 Description
<!-- Provide a more detailed description of the changes -->

### 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link to any related issues -->
- Fixes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)

### 🧪 Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Browser testing completed
- [ ] Performance testing completed

### 📊 Performance Impact
<!-- Describe any performance impact -->

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Minor performance degradation
- [ ] Significant performance degradation (needs justification)

### 📚 Documentation
<!-- List any documentation changes -->

- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Getting started guide updated
- [ ] Tutorials updated
- [ ] Examples updated
- [ ] Changelog updated

### 🔍 Review Checklist
<!-- Mark the relevant options with an `x` -->

- [ ] Code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] Self-review of the code completed
- [ ] Code is properly commented where necessary
- [ ] Changes have been tested thoroughly
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed
- [ ] No breaking changes (or clearly documented)
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Performance impact considered
- [ ] Security implications considered
- [ ] Accessibility impact considered
- [ ] Cross-platform compatibility considered

### 📸 Screenshots
<!-- Add screenshots if applicable -->

### 📄 Additional Notes
<!-- Add any additional context or notes -->

### 🚀 Deployment
<!-- Mark deployment readiness -->

- [ ] Ready for deployment
- [ ] Requires additional testing
- [ ] Requires documentation updates
- [ ] Breaking changes - needs migration guide

### 📋 Pre-merge Checklist
<!-- Mark the relevant options with an `x` -->

- [ ] All checks pass
- [ ] Approved by maintainers
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Ready for merge

---

## 🤝 Thank You!

Thank you for contributing to the Procedural Pixel Engine! Your contributions help make the engine better for everyone.
